commands.help: Inject shellcode via conhost.exe ConsoleWindowClass vftable hijack
commands.long_help: Injects shellcode by hijacking the ConsoleWindowClass virtual function table in conhost.exe using direct syscalls loaded from ntdll on disk. Overwrites the GetWindowHandle entry in the vftable and triggers execution via WM_SETFOCUS. Restores the original vftable after execution. Target must be a console process with a corresponding conhost.exe child process.

arguments.name: pid
arguments.desc: Target console process ID (must have a conhost.exe child process)
